allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); schema=data.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\).get\('SignupRequest',{}\); print\('required:', schema.get\('required'\)\); print\('dob:', schema.get\('properties',{}\).get\('dob'\)\)")

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\); Write-Host "PIDs on 8000: $pids"; $pids | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, Path })

PowerShell($pid8k = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq Listen | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\); Write-Host "Still listening on 8000: $pid8k"; if \($pid8k\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8k -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $pid8k2 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq Listen | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\); Write-Host "After second kill: $pid8k2")

PowerShell($pid8k = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq Listen | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\); Write-Host "Currently listening: $pid8k")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['components']['schemas']['SignupRequest']; print\('required:', s['required']\); print\('dob nullable:', 'null' in str\(s['properties'].get\('dob',''\)\)\)")
